text:
Created attachment 171069
phplist-update-3.2.5

THere is new version of phplist software. I've made a patch which was tested with poudriere. Log of poudriere you can find at:
https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2016-06-03_12h35m52s/logs/phplist-3.2.5.log

Accrding to project homepage this release fixes some bugs and introduces new features.
